command.description.ocr: Recognize text in images or PDFs via OCR
command.help.ocr: /ocr - OCR image or PDF text; reply to an image, image file, or PDF file, or use in image/PDF caption
prompt.ocr_reply_image_first: Please reply to an image, image file, or PDF file, then use /ocr.
error.image_download_failed: Failed to download the file. Please check if it is a valid image or PDF file.
error.ocr_empty_result: OCR completed, but no text was extracted.
